base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should create a small VALID_0DTE call_wall_acceptance_long sample without changing no-0DTE routing or touching global vetoes. The intended improvement is incremental convex call-wall PnL and better profile discovery; reject if it remains zero-trade, admits stale/missing 0DTE entries, increases exposure without PnL, or pulls total net profit below 98% of run_029.
label: promote
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long. The leader base run_029 should be protected, and recent upstream timing experiments were catastrophic. call_wall_acceptance_long is router-listed and enabled but unreachable in the latest analysis, so this is an isolated sample-builder rather than another pullback/veto/take-profit perturbation. It preserves valid 0DTE option confirmation and does not loosen missing-0DTE fallback policy.
